prospects.name: Matthew
prospects.title: Enterprise Account Executive
prospects.why: Second enterprise AE for intel; lower priority than Costa unless differentiated by vertical or tenure.
prospects.warm_angle: Same buyer-side angle works; useful if Matthew covers financial services or HR tech accounts.

prospects.name: Tanvi
prospects.title: Recruitment
prospects.why: Second recruiter; contact if Ruhi is unresponsive or covers a different function.
prospects.warm_angle: Same pitch; Tyler's buyer-to-seller transition story is memorable in a recruiter screen.

prospects.name: Brandon
prospects.title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
prospects.why: Specialist-level recruiter is lower leverage; Julie or Youna are better RC targets.

prospects.name: Kevin
prospects.title: GTM Recruiter - International
prospects.why: International-focused recruiter; lower relevance unless Decagon has US roles under his purview.

prospects.name: Leonard
prospects.title: VP Revenue EMEA
prospects.why: EMEA-focused; Tyler is Chicago-based with U.S. enterprise background, making geographic fit weak unless role is global.
prospects.warm_angle: State Department international exposure gives some EMEA credibility but not a strong hook for a regionally scoped VP.

prospects.name: Vince
prospects.title: Head of Global Data Storage Go to Market Strategy and Sales Enablement
prospects.why: Data storage GTM focus is a narrow vertical unlikely to align with Tyler's HR/financial services/AI governance background.

prospects.name: Matt
prospects.title: Talent Acquisition
prospects.why: General talent acquisition with no GTM-specific signal; lower priority than Kat but worth a brief note if Kat is unresponsive.

prospects.name: Max
prospects.title: Talent Acquisition
prospects.why: General talent acquisition with no GTM-specific signal; same logic as Matt — backup only.

prospects.name: Romit
prospects.title: Account Executive | Mid-Market
prospects.why: Mid-market AE is a lower-priority intel source but can still offer culture and process insight.
prospects.warm_angle: If mid-market is a stepping stone Rogo uses to prove vertical fit before enterprise, Tyler's financial services governance experience is a differentiator worth testing in conversation.

prospects.name: Gil
prospects.title: Tech Talent Acquisition & Sourcing Specialist
prospects.why: Tech talent sourcer at Scale AI could surface open GTM/AE roles, but limited influence over hiring decisions.
prospects.warm_angle: Tyler's rare combo of hands-on Claude/API builds plus enterprise buyer experience is a specific pitch for why he stands out in a tech-savvy sales pool.
